sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82002" key="peri/prhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περίπρησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n82002.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">burning all round</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὅλου τοῦ σώματος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:24:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24.3</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
